tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Savage Garden, Crash And Burn.
Tabbed by K.N.G.S.™, eddsibal@mbox5.singnet.com.sg

Title: Crash And Burn
Artist: Savage Garden
------------------------------
Note: This is the version without using the capo (preferred)

[Intro]
| N.C. | % |
| [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]C#m[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] |
| [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]C#m[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] |

[Verse 1]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]
When you feel all alone [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
And the world has turned it's back on you [/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Give me a moment please to tame your wild wild heart [/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
I know you feel like the walls are closing in on you [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
It's hard to find relief and people can be so cold [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
When darkness is upon your door and you feel like you can't take anymore [/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                       [ch]B[/ch]
  Let me be the one you call [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
If you jump I'll break your fall [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
Lift you up and fly away with you in the night [/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
  If you need to fall apart [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
I can mend a broken heart [/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C#m[/ch]
If you need to crash then crash and burn [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]B[/ch]             | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]C#m[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] |
You're not alone [/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
When you feel all alone [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
And a loyal friend is hard to find [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]B[/ch]
You're caught in a one way street [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
With the monsters in your head [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
When hopes and dreams are far away and [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]   
You feel like you can't face the day [/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                       [ch]B[/ch]
  Let me be the one you call [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
If you jump I'll break your fall [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
Lift you up and fly away with you in the night [/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
  If you need to fall apart [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
I can mend a broken heart [/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C#m[/ch]
If you need to crash then crash and burn [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]B[/ch]             | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]C#m[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] |
You're not alone [/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]                  [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch]
Because there has always been heartache and pain[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
And when it's all over you'll breathe again[/tab]
[tab]                      | [ch]C#m[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]C#m[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] |
You'll breathe again [/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]
When you feel all alone [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
And the world has turned it's back on you [/tab]

Note: This is the version with capo on the 4th fret instead of playing E, B, C#m, A (not preferred)
------------------------------ 
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
When you feel all alone [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
And the world has turned it's back on you [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Give me a moment please to tame your wild wild heart [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
I know you feel like the walls are closing in on you [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
It's hard to find relief and people can be so cold [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
When darkness is upon your door and you feel like you can't take anymore [/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
Let me be the one you call [/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]Am[/ch]
If you jump I'll break your fall [/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Lift you up and fly away with you in the night [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
If you need to fall apart [/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
I can mend a broken heart [/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]F[/ch]
If you need to crash then crash and burn [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] (Play intro one time)
You're not alone [/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
When you feel all alone [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
And a loyal friend is hard to find [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
You're caught in a one way street[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
With the monsters in your head [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                          [ch]G[/ch]
When hopes and dreams are far away and [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
You feel like you can't face the day [/tab]

(Repeat Chorus)

[Refrain]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]                                       [ch]Am[/ch]
Because there has always been heartache and pain[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
And when it's all over you'll breathe again[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] (As intro)
You'll breathe again [/tab]

(Repeat Half Of Verse 1 -until "heart" but without playing B)
(Repeat Chorus 4X until the end without playing intro at the end of each repeated verse)
------------------------------
Enjoy the song!
Sorry if the tabs may not be accurate to your hearing,
as well as the lyrics 'coz just started playing guitar.
For corrections please e-mail me at eddsibal@mbox5.singnet.com.sg .
This is for you, Lord.

©2000
I still prefer playing without the capo as it is the original version.
